SEARCH
Module overrungl.glfw
Package overrungl.glfw

Class GLFWVidMode

java.lang.Object
overrun.marshal.struct.Struct
overrungl.glfw.GLFWVidMode
All Implemented Interfaces:
overrun.marshal.Addressable
public final class GLFWVidMode extends overrun.marshal.struct.Struct
This describes a single video mode.

Layout


 struct GLFWvidmode {
     int width;
     int height;
     int redBits;
     int greenBits;
     int blueBits;
     int refreshRate;
 }
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
See Also:
  • GLFW.getVideoMode(java.lang.foreign.MemorySegment)
  • GLFW.getVideoModes(java.lang.foreign.MemorySegment)
